assumptions: Mock India market assessment uses seeded price points normalized to 2025 INR.
price_range: INR 58-70 per kg in an India commodity-petrochemical window.
competitor_notes: Domestic demand is linked to polyester and PET chains.
Feedstock integration and logistics materially influence margin resilience.
capacity_rationale: 200000 TPA is large enough to justify continuous purification, utility integration, and capital recovery for an EO-based route.
markdown: The 200000 TPA basis is framed as a large continuous petrochemical train aligned with India polyester and resin demand rather than a niche batch-chemical facility. The market case depends on large throughput, stable EO integration, and India-based logistics and tariff assumptions, all normalized in INR.
